summary: Made two surgical exit-continuity edits to keep Marcia's work pressure active after the school hearing and point cleanly toward the next chapter's return to Miss Elena's house. The opening already used a distinct scaffold from the visible adjacent opening, so it was left intact.
edits: Changed Marcia's bus-stop line to specify that she has to get to work, preserving pressure from the hearing into the rest of her day.
Specified that Marcia's southbound bus is taking her to Miss Elena's house to strengthen the handoff into the next chapter.
